summary.notes: 6/16 run: 3 AGM + 4 SL new invites sent. STRONG: Matthew Krieger (GM @ Steak N Shake 4yr+), Cordell Jessie (Asst Store Mgr @ Speedway 3yr), Jaishana Guin (Manager @ CVS/Walgreens/Family Dollar). Megan Kurschner (AGM, Shift Manager @ Taco Bell). Alijah Jefferys (SL, Asst Manager @ Family Dollar). Evelyn Caudill (SL Middletown, Manager @ Spinell's Pizza — borderline lean-inclusive). Tiffany Bott (SL Dixie, Hourly Shift Coordinator @ Burger King — borderline lean-inclusive). Skipped: Marshawn Ford (re-apply AGM, already invited 6/13). Travis Taylor (SL Dixie, high school student, no work history). Tonia Riley (SL applicant but applied to Crew Member role, excluded per rules). Demyia Bartlett (SL Dixie, no work history). Ta'Shyania Gills (Crew applicant despite Asst Store Mgr history, excluded per rules). Cheyenne Rice (Crew applicant despite mgmt history, excluded).
